fields.body: Hi! I go by the name "Hououin" (inspired by Steins;Gate xD) on the internet. I have been an anime watercolor artist since 2023 (started being more serious about it in 2024). I love experimenting with various art styles. However my most favorite thing to paint is crossovers (as evident in this gallery xD). Hange is my all-time favorite anime character, and also my muse. I love trying out new art ideas with her. I promise, I paint other characters too :3
fields.success_text: Thanks for your message! I will get back to you shortly.
fields.error_text: Sorry! Something went wrong. Please try again.
fields.subject: Commission Request
fields.modal_button_text: Want a custom artwork? I do commissions too!

fields.description: Close-up face shot style :3
Hange as Howl, I love how this outfit looks on her!
S1 Hange in a sparkly sweater!
Point guard of Shiganshina Titans ;)
Repaint of the same reference I painted in March 2024 :)
First one is Hange in Edward Elric's shirt. And the second one is her in a sailor uniform because why not :3
Painted Hange in Ghibli-style because of the Ghibli art trend lol (even though I'm not a trend person at all) ;)
Tried painting Hange in the same pose as my favorite picture of Howl, but it kinda failed xD
The first one is Hange in the outfit Howl wears near the end of the movie. Second one is a redraw of the second Hange from January because my coloring style changed a little ;)
This was a redraw of my first April Hange. I like that one better xD
Repaint of my first ever watercolor painting. I do this every year to see how my style has been evolving :3
Hange if she was an NBA player. Shiganshina Scouts ;)
A lil trial for a new watercolor effect ;)
Eldia's badminton ace ;)
Probably the first time I painted Hange in a braid. Tanabata special btw :3
Hange in Junior High Hange's outfit. That was supposed to be my hand but it's too big xD
Hange birthday special painting. The only time I tried a self portrait, it was fun though :3
Hange in a braid again, but this time the braid actually looks like one. The white cat turned out to be too realistic xD
Hange eating a donut while maple leaves adorn her xD
Hange celebrating Diwali :)
Used watercolor for the lineart instead of my usual ballpoint pen. It was fun ;)
Hange excited about petting Eevee :3
Tried the Frieren looking up art trend but with Hange. Painted clouds after more than a year, and it was very much fun :3
Hange after a judo match. Heavily inspired by Yawara Inokuma ;)
Made these sketches in July 2025 and haven't painted them yet xD

content.title: About Me
content.content:
[{"type": "text", "value": "

Hi! I go by the name \"Hououin\" (inspired by Steins;Gate xD) on the internet. I am a watercolor anime artist who loves experimenting with various art styles. I enjoy reimagining anime characters in unique settings. My most favorite thing to paint is probably crossovers (most of my Hange art here is exactly that xD). I promise I paint other characters too, not just Hange :3

Do follow me on Instagram!

", "id": "68e26e28-2f70-47a9-bf62-56cd27188532"}]

content.title: About Me
content.body:
Hi! I go by the name "Hououin" (inspired by Steins;Gate xD) on the internet. I have been an anime watercolor artist since 2023 (started being more serious about it in 2024). I love experimenting with various art styles. However my most favorite thing to paint is crossovers (as evident in this gallery xD). Hange is my all-time favorite anime character, and also my muse. I love trying out new art ideas with her. I promise, I paint other characters too :3
Do follow me on Instagram!

Do follow me on Instagram!
